name: tiger eye bracelet with rice chain
details:
Product Description
Add a bold yet elegant touch to your everyday style with this Tiger Eye bracelet. Designed with glossy natural stone beads and a sleek gold-tone link chain, this bracelet gives a classy, premium look that feels both modern and meaningful. Perfect for daily wear or gifting.

Bracelet Details
Tiger Eye Energy:
Tiger Eye is known for confidence, focus, courage, grounding, and strong decision-making energy.

Metallic Accent Beads:
The metallic accent beads add a balanced, powerful look and enhance the bracelet’s bold styling.

Gold-Tone Link Chain:
The bracelet features a premium gold-tone elongated link chain that gives it a stylish and polished finish.

Adjustable Closure:
Designed with an adjustable clasp and extension chain for a comfortable and secure fit.

Why You’ll Love It

Stylish everyday bracelet
Premium unisex design
Elegant mix of stone beads and gold-tone chain
Easy to pair with casual and festive outfits
Ideal for gifting

Specifications

Net Quantity: 1 Bracelet
Suitable For: Men & Women
Style: Unisex Stone Bracelet
Main Stone: Tiger Eye
Accent Beads: Metallic finish beads
Chain Type: Gold-tone elongated link chain
Closure Type: Lobster clasp with extension chain
Fit Type: Adjustable
Finish: Glossy and polished
